The number of building permits
issued during the year closing today
is 1902 and the amount of money
represented is s1.321,714. During 1901
there were 1899 permits issued, GO
less than this year. and yet the value
Of the buildings erected is S1,516,996,
difference of $195,2s2 in favor of
1901. This difference is accounted for
by the fact that, while not so many
buildings were erected, several more
expensive ones, such as the Great
Northern depot and the Spokane Club
building, were included in last years
list. Six of the ~ months of this
year will show a substantial increase
over last year.


The amount invested in residences
this year is fully third larger than
the amount invested last year. while
the number of business buildings
erected is much smaller than last
year.


1t is estimated by those in a posi-
ton to k.ow that fully 800 dwellings
have been added 20 the city during
the past year, so that, while the
total amount invested is somewhat
smaller, the real benefit to the city
is fully equal to that of 1901.
